data.title: Sherritt Announces Closing of Non‑Brokered Private Placement
data.description: Toronto-based Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) has successfully completed a non-brokered private placement of common shares, raising around $43.5 million. The private placement involved issuing approximately 207 million common shares from the corporation's treasury at a price of $0.21 per share. This transaction is part of the Corporation's strategic financial initiatives.

data.title: Canoe EIT Income Fund Announces April 2026 Monthly Distribution
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 7, 2026, Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX - EIT.UN) declared a monthly distribution of $0.10 per unit for April 2026. Shareholders recorded on April 22, 2026, are set to receive the distributions on May 15, 2026.

data.title: DOJ under Trump administration denies Tornado Cash developer's appeal for dismissal, citing Supreme Court ruling.
data.description: Prosecutors have stated that the upcoming retrial of Roman Storm, the developer of Tornado Cash, will not be impacted by a recent Supreme Court decision. Storm's case will proceed regardless of the ruling.

data.title: COSCIENS Comments on Unusual Market Activity
data.description: In Toronto, Ontario on April 7, 2026, COSCIENS Biopharma Inc. (TSX: CSCI) (OTCQB: CSCIF) addressed recent market activity by releasing a statement. The company, known as COSCIENS, typically refrains from discussing market movements or speculation. However, they clarified that they have no significant undisclosed information that could explain the recent surge in trading volume and share price of their common stock.

data.title: Home BancShares, Inc. Ranked #2 on S&P Global Market Intelligence’s Top 50 U.S. Public Banks for 2025
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Conway, Arkansas, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB), the parent company of Centennial Bank, revealed that it secured the 2nd position on S&P Global Market Intelligence’s Top 50 U.S. Public Banks list for 2025. This ranking is specifically for banks with over $10 billion in total assets.

data.title: Anthropic introduces Subagent Framework in Claude Code AI Dev Tool for developers to parallelize tasks and run AI reviews independently to enhance efficiency.
data.description: The latest innovation from Claude Code introduces a new subagent system that enables developers to parallelize coding tasks and conduct separate AI reviews. This advancement proves beneficial in scenarios where multiple coding tasks need to be completed simultaneously. This feature allows for a more efficient and streamlined workflow, ultimately enhancing productivity in programming.

data.title: UGI Corporation to Hold Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, May 7
data.description: UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI) from Valley Forge, Pa., is set to report its Fiscal 2026 second quarter results on May 6, 2026, after the market closes. A live audio webcast of the conference call discussing these results will be held at 9:00 AM ET on May 7. For those interested, the webcast can be listened to live or on replay at https://www.ugicorp.com/investors/financial-reports/events-and-presentations or by visiting the company’s website, https://www.ugicorp.com.

data.title: Capstone Copper to Release First Quarter Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: Capstone Copper Corp., traded as TSX:CS and ASX:CSC, is set to announce its first quarter results for 2026 on April 29, 2026, after the market closes. Following the release, an investor conference call will take place on the same day at 5:00pm ET / 2:00pm PT (April 30, 2026, 7:00am AET). The webcast and call to discuss the Q1 2026 results will occur at 5:00pm ET / 2:00pm PT on April 29, 2026.

data.title: WM Technology, Inc. Announces Voluntary Delisting From Nasdaq
data.description: WM Technology, Inc., a prominent marketplace and technology solutions provider to the cannabis sector, has disclosed its choice to voluntarily remove its Class A common stock and warrants from the Nasdaq Global Select Market. The company, listed under Nasdaq as MAPS, plans to submit a Form 25 to the SEC for the delisting process and subsequent deregistration. This decision has been made to pivot the company’s strategic direction.

data.title: Bird Construction Inc. Announces Release Date and Conference Call for 2026 First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: Ontario-based Bird Construction Inc. (TSX: BDT) revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 after markets close on Wednesday, May 13, 2026. To delve deeper into the results, the company will conduct a conference call and live webcast on Thursday, May 14 at 10:00 a.m. (ET). This initiative aims to provide stakeholders and investors with insights into the company's progress and financial standing.

data.title: Carmerica in Sellersburg, IN Joins the Sun Auto Network as Its Third Store Serving Southern Indiana
data.description: Expanding its reach in the Greater Louisville area, a Sellersburg-based company recently became a part of a nationwide network with over 575 locations. On April 6, 2026, Carmerica in Sellersburg, Indiana, officially joined the Sun Auto Network. This move enhances the company's coverage in the market and bolsters its position within the network.

data.title: PenFed Credit Union and Everfi Host Sixth Financial Literacy Event for High School Students at Anita Otero Hernandez Specialized School of Fine Arts in Humacao, Puerto Rico
data.description: PenFed Credit Union demonstrates its commitment to Puerto Rico's future through the provision of financial education to more than 5,000 students from both public and private schools. In collaboration with Everfi, an interactive learning event was conducted in TYSONS, Va., on April 7, 2026. This initiative aims to enhance financial literacy among students and equip them with essential skills for managing their finances effectively.
Firm Capital Apartment REIT shares Q4/2025 and 2025 results during strategic review update.

data.title: Aeroméxico Announces Webcast of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Grupo Aeroméxico S.A.B. de C.V. announced a live conference call and webcast scheduled for April 22, 2026, at 09:30 a.m. Mexico City Time (11:30 a.m. Eastern Time). During the session, Aeroméxico will review its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company's stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol AERO and BMV as AERO.

data.title: Primis Financial Corp. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Primis Financial Corp. revealed plans to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 23, 2026 after the market closes. The company, listed as FRST on NASDAQ, will conduct a conference call and audio session post-release. The call is anticipated to offer insights into the company's performance, with analysts and investors eagerly awaiting the disclosed data. This event marks a significant moment for stakeholders as they assess the company's financial standing and trajectory in the market.
